name: Chewy Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the vegetable oil, brown sugar substitute, vanilla extract, and egg until well combined.
2. Gradually add in the wheat flake cereal, all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and wheat germ, stirring until just incorporated.
3. Fold in the chopped raisins and baking soda dissolved in water.
4. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
5. Bake at 350°F for 8 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
